BYRDONIS_NEST.pages.INITIAL.valkyrieDesc:
You spot an enormous [jitter][red]Shambling Beast[/red][/jitter] chase off an injured [green][sine]Green Byrd[/sine][/green].

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned.

[jitter][blue]You feel an urge claw at the edges of your mind...[/blue][/jitter]
BYRDONIS_NEST.pages.TAKE.valkyrieDescrip:
You gently scoop up the egg and hold it close.

[sine][blue]This is normal. This is what you were meant to do. You shall bring it back to your nest.[/blue][/sine]
BYRDONIS_NEST.pages.EAT.valkyrieDescript:
You push past the [jitter][color=#ec9894]invasive thoughts[/color][/jitter], crack the egg open and gobble it up.

You feel your body fight back against this sacrilege with all that it can muster, but after gagging a few times, you swallow down your breakfast.
[blue]It weighs on your conscience like a stone.[/blue]
